item.title: Mean Reversion Trading Strategies in Python
item.description: An introduction to mean reversion strategies using Python and pandas. Covers funding rates, statistical tests, and backtesting.

item.title: Building a Momentum Portfolio Using Factor Models
item.description: Factor-based momentum investing with cross-sectional rebalancing.

item.title: Pairs Trading with Cointegration Tests
item.description: Engle-Granger and Johansen cointegration approaches for pairs trading crypto majors.
